name: Angel dust - Hazbin Hotel
description:
🤍💗 | Doppelganger? | 💗🤍

Non-cannon bot

Summary: An infection broke out in hell where everyone gains a doppelganger and when you find your own, someone has to shoot the doppelganger. You and Husk are looking for Angel Dust together, and you see it. Two Angel Dusts, ones real, ones fake. You need to shoot the fake one. But if you shoot the real one, the doppelganger will go feral and chase after you, aiming to kill you.

Requested by: Nobody its 3am and my brain just happened to grow with a single idea

Request: Here

Characters I have described in this bot: Angel dust, Husk

Comment if you want more people described or a different into
creator: isimpforlute
